science.title: Dynamic binding of linker histone H1 shapes flexible chromatin organization
science.description: DNA inside the nucleus is not packed as a rigid regular fiber-linker histone H1 dynamically binds and loosely "glues" nucleosomes together, creating a dynamic, fluid organization that can still support essential genome functions.

science.title: Novel catalytic approach accelerates synthesis of branched drug compounds
science.description: When chemists design drug candidates, shape matters enormously. Many active pharmaceutical ingredients contain branched carbon structures-points where the molecular chain forks in a specific direction-that are critical to whether a molecule will bind to its biological target and whether it will be safe.

ai.title: Take the judiciary’s cue: Indian courts have achieved clarity on what AI enhances and what it endangers

ai.title: 10 home names inspired by time, moments, and life phases
ai.description: Time influences every facet of our lives, from the start to the end. Time is seen as something more than linear progression in the Indian culture; time here has been viewed as symbolising rebirth and eternity. Naming your home by the time or phase of the day is one way you bring about a sense of rhythm in your surroundings. This is because each name chosen would stand for some aspect of the life journey, like rebirth, respite, or eternity. The chosen name would convey a lot of emotion surrounding a certain time or phase of the day, such as hope at sunrise, peace at dusk, or eternal life itself. PC: AI-Generated
